name: Rainbow Blossom's Vegetable Soup
recipeIngredient: 1 small Head broccoli, cut into florets
1 small Head cauliflower, cut into florets
28 oz Can tomatoes and juice, diced
recipeInstructions:
A blended seasoning mixture.
My note: Blech! Use the real stuff!
In a large kettle, sauté onion and celery in oil until onions are translucent.
Add broccoli, cauliflower, potatoes, carrots, zucchini, squash, tomatoes and juice, lima beans, green beans, corn, peas, and water. Stir well.
(If you prefer a thinner soup, more water can be added.) Stir the Spike seasoning, garlic flakes, basil, thyme, cumin, chili powder, oregano, parsley flakes, sweetener, and tamari sauce into the mixture.
Simmer 1 hour or until vegetables are tender.
Yield: 8 to 10 servings.
